australian_relation: ABC public article naming Stanley's Bayview Hotel and a distinct young-woman ghost tradition attached to the historic hotel.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Stanley's Bayview Hotel and the ghost tradition; exact hotel point did not verify independently, so the representative public flag uses the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Stanley town result.
evidence_summary: ABC reported on Stanley's historic Bayview Hotel and said the restorers had been told many tales of the hotel's past, including ghost stories. Sandra Parker said everyone calls the ghost a she and that she had heard stories about a young woman who fell from the original top balcony, adding that if there is a ghost she is apparently friendly.
publication_or_organisation: Stanley's Bayview Hotel - tales of a ghost, Joe Lyons and the quest for original artefacts; ABC Northern Tasmania
title: ghost in Bayview Hotel young woman ghost
